decks.notes: This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. The deck also includes control elements like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with large threats while controlling the board and preventing the opponent from mounting a strong defense. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent through its mana ramp and powerful Eldrazi creatures.

This aggro deck focuses on disrupting your opponent while building up your own board presence. By using cards like Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to control the game, along with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to apply pressure, you can quickly overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Prismatic Ending and Solitude to handle threats efficiently. With a mix of control and aggression, this Death and Taxes archetype aims to keep the opponent off balance while steadily advancing towards victory.

The deck focuses on aggressive play using Boros colored creatures and spells. It places emphasis on dealing damage quickly and efficiently to overwhelm the opponent. The cards included allow for early game pressure with low cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, and Goblin Bombardment, while also providing mid to late game options like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer. The mana base is optimized for consistency and the deck is built to take advantage of synergies between creatures and spells for maximum impact on the board.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells and powerful creatures like Phelia and Phlage. The deck also includes cards like Consign to Memory and Solitude to deal with threats effectively. The inclusion of Casey Jones and Strix Serenade provides additional utility and card advantage. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage and efficiently dealing with threats while ultimately winning the game through powerful finishers like Ragavan and Quantum Riddler.

This deck focuses on using creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant to quickly assemble a powerful combo. Cards like Neoform and Summoner's Pact help find the necessary pieces, while Eldritch Evolution and Eladamri's Call provide additional consistency. The deck also includes interaction like Pact of Negation and Repudiate/Replicate to protect the combo. Ureni, the Song Unending and Atraxa, Grand Unifier offer additional utility and synergy within the deck. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and win the game before the opponent has a chance to react.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provide support and buffs to your creatures, while Goblin Bombardment and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury offer additional sources of direct damage. The deck also includes disruption elements like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creature aggression while controlling the battlefield.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Solitude and Prismatic Ending. The deck aims to establish a board presence quickly and maintain control of the battlefield through targeted removal spells such as Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge. Additionally, cards like Quantum Riddler and Teferi, Time Raveler help to disrupt the opponent's strategies and protect your own creatures. The deck's mana base is designed to support its aggressive game plan and provide flexibility in casting its spells.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan and controlling the board through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and land destruction. It aims to out value opponents by efficiently trading cards and denying them resources. The inclusion of cards like Subtlety and Sheoldred's Edict allows for versatile answers to threats, while Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Consult the Star Charts provide card advantage and selection. The deck is designed to grind out games and win through attrition, taking advantage of the opponent's missteps and maximizing its own resources.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Tower, and Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana and play powerful threats like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck also utilizes Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Devourer of Destiny to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Kozilek's Command provide removal and disruption, while cards like Mind Stone and Expedition Map help ramp up to the late-game threats.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature-based strategies combined with burn spells and powerful planeswalkers to quickly overwhelm opponents. With a mix of strong one-drop creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and efficient removal spells like Galvanic Discharge, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain a fast-paced tempo throughout the game. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional creature tokens and support, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Arena of Glory offer additional reach and utility. The deck also utilizes powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to secure victory.

The main focus of the deck is to utilize a combination of powerful creatures and instant spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy and control the game. By efficiently countering spells and manipulating the opponent's resources, the deck aims to create opportunities to win through a powerful combo involving cards like Goblin Charbelcher. The deck heavily relies on instant speed interactions and the ability to control the tempo of the game without the need for traditional land resources. It is designed to maintain a consistent and aggressive gameplay that can quickly overwhelm opponents in a 1 vs 1 Modern format.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive strategies to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It includes a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to buff up creatures and deliver powerful finishing blows. The deck aims to apply pressure early and keep the opponent on the back foot to secure a fast victory.

This deck revolves around using Allosaurus Rider and Neoform to quickly combo off and put powerful creatures into play, such as Griselbrand or Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck includes various cards to protect the combo, including Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer, as well as ways to search for key pieces like Summoner's Pact. With the ability to quickly ramp up and summon huge threats, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and win the game in a single explosive turn.

This deck is focused on aggressive gameplay, utilizing low-cost and efficient burn spells to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. It also includes creatures like Monastery Swiftspear, Goblin Guide, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to further pressure the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Skullcrack and Arena of Glory helps to punish opponents who rely on lifegain strategies, while Chandra's Incinerator provides a powerful finisher. The deck is designed to close out games quickly and decisively before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main strategy of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressively costed creatures and burn spells, backed up by efficient removal and disruption. The deck focuses on curving out with powerful threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also utilizing versatile spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board. With cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury providing additional damage and reach, the deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to help control the board and finish off the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional creature support and buffs, while Goblin Bombardment offers a way to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful aggressive strategy.
